extortion.description: [AI generated] Coghlans.com is the online platform of Coghlan's Ltd, a Canada-based family-owned company established in 1959. The company is renowned for its camping gear, accessories & outdoor products. Its extensive product catalog includes cookware, first aid kits, insect protection, lighting, and camping tools. Coghlan's Ltd is committed to providing high-quality, affordable, and innovative products for outdoor enthusiasts around the globe.
